## Meeting Purpose

[Review Timmy's article edits and plan the upcoming week's content creation tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Article feedback: Improve intro structure, use more definitive headers, and enhance CTA section](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Weekly plan: DataGrid PSUs today, Strapi articles Tue-Wed, Galileo articles Thu](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Process updates: Stage Strapi articles in CMS, update Airtable fields thoroughly, use correct Google Drive folders](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

## Topics

### Article Feedback and Improvements

  - [Intro needs restructuring: Focus on one pain point, dive deeper, hint at solution](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Headers should be more definitive and action-oriented (e.g., "X custom CTA components you must build")](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [CTA section: Expand on Strapi-specific features and benefits](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [General improvements: Reduce fluff, be more specific in recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### Weekly Content Planning

  - [Monday: Finish DataGrid PSUs](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Tuesday-Wednesday: Complete 5 Strapi articles](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Thursday: Write 2 Galileo articles](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Set up brief syncs with Ismail (Galileo) and Nika (Strapi) today](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content Management Processes

  - [Strapi articles:](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [Move to "Need to stage in CMS" status after approval](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [Stage in CMS by Thursday/Friday](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Update URL in Airtable after staging](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Galileo articles:](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [Add Google Doc link, slug, meta title in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
      - [Create in internal folder, move to external when approved](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [DataGrid: Create directly in external folder](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Maintain Airtable accuracy for reporting purposes](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

### Upcoming Tasks

  - [Review Strapi artifacts with Matthew later this week](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Discuss artifact format with Ismail during sync](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finish DataGrid PSUs today](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Set up syncs with Ismail and Nika today](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Begin Strapi article creation tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Review and implement article feedback in future content](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Ensure proper folder usage and Airtable updates throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/HyaRTF1vg9mzJkY8QUexB-bSS9YcqSUr?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
